---
title: "S4A pooling analysis: cleaning"
author: "Tushar Garg"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
---

```{r setup, include=F}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo=F,message=F, warning=F)
suppressMessages(if (!require("pacman")) install.packages("pacman"))
pacman::p_load(tidyverse,rio,janitor,here)

source(here::here("Scripts","0.functions.R"))
```

```{r import, include=F}
master <- import(here("Data",folder_name,"data_format.csv")) %>% 
    mutate(regno = toupper(trimws(regno)))

master_pool <- import(here("Data",folder_name,"pooled_xpert_ultra.csv"))
```

```{r joining with pooled_xpert_ultra}
pos_order <- c("xpert_p_no_1","xpert_p_no_2","xpert_p_no_3","xpert_p_no_4")

# Diagnostic check for duplicate values in pools
dup_diagnostic <- master_pool %>%
  select(xpert_p_no_1, xpert_p_no_2, xpert_p_no_3, xpert_p_no_4, poolno, no_samp_in_pool) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("xpert_p_no_"),
    names_to = "xpert_position",
    values_to = "regno"
  ) %>%
  mutate(regno = na_if(trimws(regno), "")) %>%   # convert blanks to NA
  filter(!is.na(regno)) %>%
  group_by(regno) %>%
  mutate(n_matches = n()) %>%
  filter(n_matches > 1) %>%
  arrange(regno, xpert_position) %>%
  ungroup()

dup_diagnostic

# Bringing pool information into master
master_pool_transform <- master_pool %>%
  select(xpert_p_no_1, xpert_p_no_2, xpert_p_no_3, xpert_p_no_4, poolno, no_samp_in_pool) %>%
  mutate(across(starts_with("xpert_p_no_"), ~na_if(toupper(trimws(.)), ""))) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("xpert_p_no_"),
    names_to = "xpert_position",
    values_to = "regno"
  ) %>%
  mutate(regno = na_if(trimws(regno), "")) %>%   # convert blanks to NA
  filter(!is.na(regno)) %>%
  mutate(pos_rank = match(xpert_position, pos_order)) %>%
  arrange(regno, pos_rank) %>%
  distinct(regno, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  rename(poolsize = no_samp_in_pool)

master <- master %>%
  left_join(master_pool_transform, by = "regno")

# Diagnostic check for duplicate pool no.
missing_poolno <- master %>%
  filter(is.na(poolno)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(pool_resultt)) %>%
  select(regno, poolno, pool_resultt)

missing_poolno
```


```{r mapping data, include=F}
# Unique values for each column
unique_values <- master %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), ~ list(unique(.)))) %>%
  t() %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column(var = "Variable") %>%
  rename(Unique_Values = V1)

# Unique value and levels for each variable
mapping_pairs <- tribble(
  ~var_code,            ~var_label,
  "country",            "Country_Name",
  "enroltype",          "enrolment_type",
  "how_enrolled",       "how_enrolledd",
  "sex",                "sexx",
  "dwelling",           "dwellingg",
  "hiv",                "hiv_status",
  "ci_cough",           "cough",
  "ci_sputum",          "sputum",
  "ci_fever",           "fever",
  "ci_cpain",           "chest_pain",
  "ci_weak",            "weakness",
  "ci_heam",            "haemoptysis",
  "ci_wloss",           "weight_loss",
  "ci_sweat",           "night_sweats",
  "ci_appe",            "loss_of_appetite",
  "ci_short_breath",    "shortness_of_breath",
  "culture_result",     "culture_results",
  "crp_rapid_result",   "CRP Rapid",
  "urine_lam_results",  "LAM",
  "qure_outcome",       "qure_outcomee",
  "Smear_1",            "smears_1",
  "Smear_2",            "smears_2",
  "Xpert_result",       "Xpert Resultt",
  "pool_resultt",       "pool_xpert_result"
)

# Build mapping (skips pairs if either column missing)
variable_map <- mapping_pairs %>%
  filter(var_code %in% names(master), var_label %in% names(master)) %>%
  transmute(vc = var_code, vl = var_label) %>%
  pmap_dfr(\(vc, vl) {
    master %>%
      distinct(!!sym(vc), !!sym(vl)) %>%
      rename(Integer_Value = !!sym(vc), Label = !!sym(vl)) %>%
      mutate(Variable = vc, .before = 1)
  }) %>%
  select(Variable, Integer_Value, Label)


export(unique_values,here("Outputs","Intermediate outputs","unique_values.csv"))
export(variable_map,here("Outputs","Intermediate outputs","variable_map.csv"))
```


```{r cleaning}
# Culture NTM = Culture negative
master <- master %>%
  mutate(
    culture = case_when(
      culture_result == 1 & culture_mtb_ntm == "NTM" ~ "neg",  #NTM -> Culture Negative
      culture_result == 1 & culture_mtb_ntm == "MTB" ~ "pos",  #MTB -> Culture Positive
      culture_result == 2 ~ "neg",
      culture_result == 3 ~ "contaminated"
    ),
    culture = factor(culture, levels = c("neg", "pos", "contaminated"))
  )

# Combining Nigeria JHF and ZRC into Nigeria
master <- master %>%
  mutate(org = case_when(
    Country_Name == "Nigeria JHF" ~ "JHF",
    Country_Name == "Nigeria ZRC" ~ "ZRC",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  ),
  Country_Name = if_else(Country_Name %in% c("Nigeria JHF", "Nigeria ZRC"), "Nigeria", Country_Name)) 

# Creating age_type, setting, and cleaning ssm (setting and ssm aligned with Marc's code)
master <- master %>%
  mutate(
    age_type = case_when(
      age < 15 ~ "Child",
      age >= 15 ~ "Adult",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    setting=case_when(
      Country_Name=="Cameroon" & enrolment_type %in% c("PCF","ICF") & key_population=="Primary Health Centre"~"PHC",
      Country_Name=="Cameroon" & enrolment_type %in% c("PCF","ICF") & key_population=="Child"~"Children",
      Country_Name=="Cameroon" & enrolment_type %in% c("PCF","ICF") & key_population=="District Hospital"~"District",
      Country_Name=="Cameroon" & enrolment_type=="ACF" & key_population=="Rural"~"Rural",
      Country_Name=="Nigeria" & enrolment_type %in% c("PCF","ICF") & grepl(Site,pattern="PHC")~"PHC",
      Country_Name=="Nigeria" & enrolment_type %in% c("PCF","ICF") & grepl(Site,pattern="District")~"District",
      Country_Name=="Nigeria" & enrolment_type=="ACF" & key_population=="IDP"~"IDP",
      Country_Name=="Nigeria" & enrolment_type=="ACF" & key_population=="Refugee"~"IDP",
      Country_Name=="Nigeria" & enrolment_type=="ACF" & key_population=="Nomad"~"Nomads",
      Country_Name=="Kenya" & enrolment_type %in% c("PCF","ICF") & grepl(Site,pattern="Sub")~"PHC",
      Country_Name=="Kenya" & enrolment_type %in% c("PCF","ICF") & grepl(Site,pattern="Referral")~"District",
      Country_Name=="Bangladesh" & enrolment_type %in% c("PCF","ICF") & Site %in% c("Charghat Upazila Healh Complexes, Rajshahi","Godagari Upazila Health Complexes, Rajshahi")~"PHC", # as per Vibol email from 13/02/2025
      Country_Name=="Bangladesh" & enrolment_type %in% c("PCF","ICF") & Site %in% c("250 Bedded Sadar Hospital, Chapainawabganj","Narsingdi District Hospital","Narsingdi Sadar Hospital")~"District", # as per Vibol email from 13/02/2025
      Country_Name=="Bangladesh" & enrolment_type=="ACF" & key_population=="Informal Settlement"~"Informal settlements",
      Country_Name=="Brazil"~"PHC",
      Country_Name=="Viet Nam" & key_population=="Urban" & enrolment_type=="ICF"~"District",
      Country_Name=="Viet Nam" & key_population=="Urban" & enrolment_type=="ACF"~"Informal settlements",
      # Country_Name=="Viet Nam" & key_population=="Child" & enrolment_type=="ICF"~"Children",
      Country_Name=="Viet Nam" & key_population=="Child"~"Children",
      Country_Name=="Malawi"~"PHC",
      TRUE~NA_character_
    ),
    ssm=case_when(
      smears_1=="Scanty" | grepl(smears_1,pattern="\\+") | smears_2=="Scanty" | grepl(smears_2,pattern="\\+") ~ 1,
      (smears_1=="Neg" & !(smears_1=="Scanty" | grepl(smears_1,pattern="\\+"))) | (smears_2=="Neg" & !(smears_2=="Scanty" | grepl(smears_2,pattern="\\+")))~0,
      smears_1 %in% c("Missing","Not Done","") & smears_2 %in% c("Missing","Not Done","")~NA_integer_,
      is.na(smears_1) & is.na(smears_2)~NA_integer_
    )
  )

# Case-finding column
# ACF = CBCF = community-based case-finding
# PCF+ICF = FBCF = facility-based case-finding
master <- master %>%
  mutate(case_finding = recode(enrolment_type,
                                 "ACF" = "CBCF",
                                 "ICF" = "FBCF",
                                 "PCF" = "FBCF")) %>% 
# A new variable for setting = ACF, District, PHC, Children
  mutate(
    settingACF = case_when(
      setting %in% c("IDP", "Informal settlements", "Nomads","Rural") ~ "ACF",
      TRUE ~ setting
    )
  ) %>% 
  # cleaning HIV variable
  mutate(
    hiv_status_short = case_when(
      hiv_status == "Positive" ~ "Positive",
      hiv_status == "Negative" ~ "Negative",
      TRUE ~ "Unknown"
    ) %>%
      factor(levels = c("Positive", "Negative", "Unknown"))
  )


# fixing mtb_grade. bringing trace from xpert result
master <- master %>%
  mutate(
    mtb_grade = if_else(`Xpert Resultt` == "Trace", "Trace", as.character(mtb_grade)) %>%
      factor(levels = c("High", "Low", "Medium", "Very Low", "Trace"))
  )

# New variables: AI score >= 0.3, w4ss.
master <- master %>%
  mutate(
    ai30 = factor(
      if_else(xray_ai_score >= 0.3, "Yes", "No", missing = NA_character_),
      levels = c("Yes", "No")
    ),
    w4ss = if_else(
      if_any(c(cough, fever, weight_loss, night_sweats), ~ . == "Yes"),
      "Yes", "No"
    ) %>% factor(levels = c("Yes", "No"))
  )

```

```{r export, include=F}
saveRDS(master, here("Outputs","Intermediate outputs","master_clean.rds"))
```
